title: helictotrichon montanum
intro: Helictotrichon montanum, also known as Mountain fleece or Golden grass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the Poaceae family. The medicinal properties of Helictotrichon montanum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Helictotrichon montanum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its dried flowers and leaves can be used to make herbal remedies that promote overall well-being.
